articles.title: Scottish Counterterror Police Investigating After 5 Hurt In Apparent Anti-Muslim Attacks In Edinburgh
articles.content:
伦敦（美联社）——苏格兰警方周六表示，反恐侦探正在调查爱丁堡发生的袭击事件，该事件造成五人受伤，袭击似乎针对穆斯林。

苏格兰警方表示，在接到多起关于城市西部和北部袭击事件的报告后，一名36岁男子于周五深夜被捕。

警方称，五名男性受害者年龄分别为22岁（两人）、24岁、27岁和39岁，他们受到不同程度的伤害，其中三人需要住院治疗。没有人有生命危险。

慈善机构“穆斯林参与与发展组织”表示，部分伤者是穆斯林。苏格兰清真寺协会表示，两名伤者在参加当地清真寺祈祷活动后遭到袭击。

英国首相基尔·斯塔默表示，嫌疑人“似乎是出于反穆斯林仇恨的动机”。

他在X平台上发帖称：“我不会容忍这种行为——他将面临法律的全面制裁。”

社交媒体上发布的视频显示，一名赤裸上身的男子手持长武器在街上游荡，并在苏格兰首都一家餐厅门口猛烈撞击。另一段视频似乎显示，同一名男子被警察按倒在地时高喊“保护国家”。

英国内政大臣沙巴纳·马哈茂德表示，她“对爱丁堡袭击的消息感到震惊”。

她说：“对穆斯林怀有仇恨和暴力行为是没有容身之地的。我知道这不是我们作为一个国家的本色。”

英国穆斯林委员会在一份声明中表示，穆斯林社区“完全有理由感到紧张和担忧”。声明称，这一暴力事件“是政治言论妖魔化整个社区的直接后果”。

苏格兰警方助理警司卡特里奥娜·佩顿表示，这是一起“令人震惊”的事件。她说，警官们“得到了反恐警察部门的支持”。

她说：“我想向所有社区发出一个明确的支持信息——在苏格兰，种族主义和基于信仰的仇恨没有容身之地，当我们团结一致时，苏格兰才是最好的。”
articles.summary:
LOADINGERROR LOADING
&

LONDON (AP) — Counterterrorism detectives in Scotland were investigating after five people were injured in attacks in Edinburgh that appeared to target Muslims, police said Saturday.

Police Scotland said that a 36-year-old man was arrested late Friday after officers received multiple reports of attacks in the west and north of the city.

Advertisement

The force said that five men — two of them age 22, and others ages 24, 27 and 39 — sustained a range of injuries and three needed hospital treatment. None of the injuries is considered life-threatening.

The charity Muslim Engagement and Development said that several of those injured are Muslim. The Scottish Association of Mosques said that two of the injured men were attacked after attending prayers at their local mosque.

U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer said that the suspect “appears to be motivated by anti-Muslim hatred.”

Advertisement

“I will not tolerate this — he will face the full force of the law,” Starmer said in a post on X.

Absolutely appalling.

No one should face violence on our streets. The suspect appears to be motivated by anti-Muslim hatred. I will not tolerate this - he will face the full force of the law.

My thoughts are with those who are injured and I thank the police and the emergency…

— Keir Starmer (@Keir_Starmer) June 20, 2026

Video posted on social media appeared to show a shirtless man carrying a long weapon roaming a street and battering a restaurant door in the Scottish capital. Another video seemed to show the same man on the ground shouting about “protecting the country” while being held by a police officer.

U.K. Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood said that she was “horrified by news of the attack in Edinburgh.

“There is no place for hatred and violence against Muslims,” she said. “I know it is not who we are as a country.”

Advertisement

The Muslim Council of Britain said in a statement that the Muslim community is “rightly nervous and worried.” It said that the violence was “a direct consequence of political rhetoric that demonizes entire communities.”

Police Scotland Assistant Chief Constable Catriona Paton said that it was a “shocking” incident. She said that officers “are being supported by Counter Terrorism Policing.

“I want to send a clear message of support to all our communities that there is no place for racism or faith-based hate in a Scotland, which is at its best when we stand together,” she said.

Advertisement
Related

articles.title: Israeli Strikes Kill 6, Including 2 Children And Al Jazeera Cameraman
articles.content:
代尔拜拉赫，加沙（美联社）——巴勒斯坦卫生官员称，以色列周六对加沙发动空袭，造成至少6人死亡，其中包括两名儿童和一名半岛电视台摄像师。

尽管以色列与激进组织哈马斯之间达成了10月停火协议，但加沙地带仍几乎每日遭受以色列袭击。加沙卫生部称，自停火以来，已有超过1000名巴勒斯坦人在袭击中丧生。

卫生部称，周六的第一次空袭于凌晨2点左右击中加沙城一套公寓。美联社记者在现场看到废墟和被血迹染红的混凝土碎块。

两名姐妹——4岁的齐娜和14岁的拉娜——的遗体被送往希法医院太平间，她们躺在白色尸袋中，家人围在身旁。

“我当时坐在家里。火箭弹毫无预警地落在我们身上，”额头受伤的表亲穆罕默德·萨法迪说。他的妻子也受了伤。

萨法迪说：“你们说的停火——占领方和谈判团队说的停火……这真的是停火吗？我们是平民。我从未拿过武器。”

以色列军方表示正在调查此事。

周六晚间，三次以色列空袭造成4人死亡，至少十余人受伤。

第一次空袭击中加沙中部布尔吉难民营的一栋房屋，造成3人死亡，其中包括半岛电视台摄像师艾哈迈德·维沙赫。Al-Aqsa医院称，空袭毫无预警。半岛电视台证实了维沙赫的死讯。

维沙赫的弟弟穆罕默德是半岛电视台的记者，今年4月在以色列空袭中丧生。

另一次空袭针对加沙南部穆瓦西难民营的一群人，造成1人死亡、8人受伤。伤者被送往纳赛尔医院。

加沙城的第三次空袭针对一群人，造成至少4人受伤。希法医院接收了伤者。

以色列军方在一份声明中称，其“精确打击”击毙了这名半岛电视台摄像师。军方声称他是哈马斯武装分支的成员，对该地区部队构成威胁。

以色列表示，其目标是哈马斯和其他构成威胁的武装分子。自停火以来，已有5名以色列士兵阵亡。

这场战争始于2023年10月7日，哈马斯领导的武装分子冲入以色列南部，杀害1200人并绑架251人作为人质。加沙卫生部称，以色列在加沙的报复性军事行动已造成73018名巴勒斯坦人死亡，其中包括停火后遇害者。

卫生部是哈马斯领导政府的一部分，由医疗专业人员组成，其详细记录通常被联合国机构和独立专家认为是可靠的。该部门未区分平民和武装人员，但表示妇女和儿童约占全部死亡人数的一半。
articles.summary:
LOADINGERROR LOADING
&

DEIR AL-BALAH, Gaza (AP) — Israeli strikes in Gaza on Saturday killed at least six people, including two children and a cameraman with broadcaster Al Jazeera, according to Palestinian health officials.

Despite an October ceasefire between Israel and the militant group Hamas, the enclave has seen near-daily Israeli attacks that have killed over 1,000 Palestinians, according to Gaza’s Health Ministry.

Advertisement

The first strike on Saturday hit an apartment in Gaza City around 2 a.m., according to the ministry. At the site, an Associated Press reporter saw rubble and chunks of concrete stained with blood.

The bodies of two sisters, 4-year-old Zina and 14-year-old Lana, were sent to Shifa Hospital’s morgue, where they lay in white hospital bags, surrounded by family members.

“I was sitting at home. The rocket fell on us without a warning,” said their cousin, Mohammad Safadi, whose forehead was wounded. He said his wife was also hurt.

Advertisement

“This ceasefire the occupation and the negotiation team speak of … is this really a ceasefire? We are civilians. I never held a weapon,” Safadi said.

Al Jazeera Media Network condemns the killing of Al Jazeera Mubasher cameraman Ahmed Washah in an Israeli strike on Al-Bureij camp in central Gaza, calling for accountability and protection for journalists.

🔴 Read full statement: https://t.co/bP36l50Fpr pic.twitter.com/umo1X2fSJg

— Al Jazeera English (@AJEnglish) June 20, 2026

The Israeli military said it was looking into the incident.

On Saturday evening, three Israeli strikes killed four people and wounded at least a dozen others.

The first hit a house in central Gaza’s Bureij refugee camp without warning, killing three people, including Al Jazeera cameraman Ahmed Wishah, according to Al-Aqsa hospital. Al Jazeera confirmed Wishah’s death.

Advertisement

Wishah’s brother Mohamed, who was a correspondent for Al Jazeera, was killed in an Israeli strike in April.

Another strike on Saturday targeted a group of people in the sprawling tent camp of Muwasi in southern Gaza, killing one and wounding eight others, according to Nasser hospital, where the casualties were taken.

A third strike in Gaza City targeted a group of people and wounded at least four, according to Shifa hospital.

Advertisement

The Israeli military in a statement said it killed the Al Jazeera cameraman in a “precise strike.” It asserted that he had been part of Hamas’ military wing and had posed a threat to troops in the area.

Israel says it is targeting Hamas and other militants who pose a threat. Five Israeli soldiers have been killed since the truce.

The war began when Hamas-led militants stormed into southern Israel, killing 1,200 people and taking 251 hostage on Oct. 7, 2023. Israel’s retaliatory military offensive in Gaza has killed 73,018 Palestinians, including those slain since the ceasefire, Gaza’s Health Ministry said.

Advertisement

The ministry, part of the Hamas-led government, is staffed by medical professionals and maintains detailed records that are generally considered reliable by United Nations agencies and independent experts. It does not distinguish between civilians and militants but says women and children make up around half of all fatalities.

Related

articles.title: Massive Fire Destroys Hotel In Dominican Republic, At Least 1 Tourist Dead
articles.content:
圣多明各消息——当局称，周五发生的一场大火几乎完全摧毁了多米尼加共和国一家豪华度假村，迫使近1700名游客撤离。

据当地媒体报道，一名意大利游客在火灾中不幸遇难，另有数名游客需要医疗救助。

这家Viva Dominicus Beach度假村隶属于温德姆酒店集团，位于巴亚希贝——这是多米尼加共和国东南沿海地区受美国和国际游客欢迎的热门目的地。

当局表示，约1690名游客被疏散至其他酒店和周边住宿设施。

火灾原因正在调查中。该国紧急行动中心称，火势迅速蔓延似乎与风力以及部分屋顶采用茅草材料有关。

该中心还表示，温德姆旗下的另一家邻近度假村Dominicus Palace未受火灾影响，正常营业。
articles.summary:
LOADINGERROR LOADING
&

SANTO DOMINGO, Dominican Republic (AP) — A large fire almost completely destroyed a luxury resort in the Dominican Republic on Friday, forcing the evacuation of almost 1,700 tourists, authorities said.

Local media reported an Italian tourist died in the fire and several other tourists required medical assistance.

Advertisement

The Viva Dominicus Beach by Wyndham resort is located in Bayahibe, a popular destination for U.S. and international tourists on the Dominican Republic’s southeastern coast.

Authorities reported about 1,690 tourists had to be evacuated from the resort to other hotels and nearby housing facilities because of the massive blaze.

Advertisement

The cause of the blaze was under investigation and the country’s Emergency Operations Center said it appeared the “fire spread rapidly” due to wind and because part of the resort’s roof was made of thatch.

Viva Wyndham’s other nearby resort, the Dominicus Palace, was not damaged by the fire and was operating as normal, the center said.

Advertisement
